description: A Slot 1 tense particle that places the clause's event or state before the present moment. Present time is unmarked. The particle marks time rather than completion; aspect particles such as 'ki' (PFV) make the event's internal shape explicit.
articulatory_notes: A dental closure at the tongue tip releases directly into mid rounded 'o'. The monosyllable takes full stress.
usage_notes: Tense is the first Slot 1 rank, so 'to' precedes any aspect, voice, evidential, modal, or negative particle in the same clause. An embedded clause carries its own 'to' when its event is past relative to the matrix event.
